title: Shrimp's Essentials
description: Improving your vanilla experience, one mod at a time
body:
Shrimp's

ESSENTIALS

==========================================================

Shrimp's Essentials aims to improve the vanilla minecraft experience.

This is done by adding over 25 mods that go anywhere from overhauling weapons to inventory tweaks.

 

==========================================================

What mods are in the modpack? Check it out!

3d skin layers , apple skin , better combat , clumps , connected glass , corpse , cosmetic armour ,

double doors , earth mobs , falling leaves , item physics , jei (just enough items) , journey map , mouse tweaks ,

not enough animations , rare ice , repurposed structures , river redux , sit , snow under trees ,

travellers backpack , tree harvester , vanilla plus tools , villager names , way stones

==========================================================

What can you expect? Lets see...

The modpack includes mods that improve the visuals of the game, making the game much more immersive and

entertaining. There are mods that overhaul existing structures and some that add brand new ones! Exploration

will also never be the same with the addition of a personal map - that allows waypoints and teleportation in the 

config - and the addition of way stones and backpacks that make exploration that bit more enjoyable. Additionally 

there is currently a single world gen mod that completely overhauls the rivers in the world making them much more 

complicated and natural. Last - but certainly not least - there are many mods that enhance vanilla functions such as 

inventory and mouse tweaks.

==========================================================

CORPSE:
https://legacy.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/corpse

Updates soon!

NOTE: The modpack is still in the works - any recommendations are welcome!
